subparts.text: Draw general model of wireless communication system.
Write the name of channel assignment strategies in mobile radio propagation.
Illustrate the function of Node B in UMTS.
Write down the efficiency of Slotted ALOHA and Pure ALOHA.
Illustrate the need to evolve third generation wireless standards.

questions.question_text: Explain frequency reuse concept with the help of proper cellular diagram. Also explain umbrella cell concept in mobile communication.

If a signal to interference ration of 15dB is required for satisfactory forward channel performance of a cellular system, Calculate the frequency reuse factor and cluster size that should be used for maximum capacity if the path loss exponent is n=4, n=3? Assume that there are 6 co-channel cells in first tier, and all of them are at the same distance from the mobile. Use suitable approximations.
Explain GSM with the help of proper network architecture block diagram. Also give brief view of various Interface standards in GSM.
Explain UMTS architecture in detail. Also explain briefly IMT 2000.
Explain FDMA and TDMA in detail with suitable diagram.
Explain RAKE receiver. Describe its working with explanation of each stage. What is the main advantage of a RAKE receiver?
Write short notes on Next Generation networks and its services. What are the fundamental characteristics for defining NGN.
Write short note on Wi-Max Introduction to 4G and 5G technology.
